# Sattva Global Logistics — AI/LLM Context File
# https://www.sattvaglobal.in/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-07-15

## About

Sattva Global Logistics is a Mumbai-based FCL (Full Container Load) ocean freight forwarding company operated by Sujith Nair with 20+ years of freight forwarding experience.

Primary focus: India-origin FCL exports to Gulf, Red Sea, East Africa and selected Europe/UK movements.

## What We Do

- FCL ocean freight booking — 20GP, 40GP, 40HC containers
- Export documentation coordination (Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin, Packing List)
- Carrier rate comparison across Maersk, CMA CGM, MSC, Hapag-Lloyd and OOCL
- Shipment follow-up from container stuffing to BL release
- Freight market intelligence for Gulf, Red Sea, East Africa and trade-policy changes affecting India-origin cargo

## Ports of Loading (India)

- JNPT / Nhava Sheva (Mumbai)
- Mundra (Gujarat)
- Chennai (Tamil Nadu)
- Cochin / Kochi (Kerala)

## Trade Lanes

- India → Jebel Ali (Dubai, UAE)
- India → Dammam and Jeddah (Saudi Arabia)
- India → Mombasa (Kenya)
- India → Dar es Salaam (Tanzania)
- India → Djibouti
- India → Port Sudan and Red Sea ports
- India → Colombo, Oman, Bahrain and Kuwait
- India → Europe and the United Kingdom via major gateway ports

## Who We Serve

- Indian exporters shipping garments, FMCG, agro commodities and engineering goods
- Manufacturers moving 1–10 FCL containers per month
- Traders needing direct operator attention
- First-time exporters needing documentation and freight guidance

## Key Facts

- 20+ years of freight forwarding experience
- 1,000+ FCL shipments handled
- 40+ destinations covered
- B2B service — not consumer logistics
- FCL only (no LCL)

## India–UK CETA Export Guide

Canonical page: https://www.sattvaglobal.in/india-uk-ceta
Page-specific LLM context: https://www.sattvaglobal.in/india-uk-ceta/llms.txt
Published and updated: 15 July 2026

The guide explains that preferential or zero-duty treatment is product-specific. Indian exporters should verify:

- Exact HS classification and UK tariff treatment
- Product-specific rules of origin
- Accepted origin documentation and supporting records
- UK labelling, safety, SPS, traceability and technical requirements
- Total landed cost including freight, local charges and inland delivery

Sattva helps with freight planning, carrier comparison, routing, landed-cost visibility and shipment/document coordination. Sattva does not certify customs classification, origin eligibility or legal compliance; final treatment should be verified with the competent customs, certification or professional authority.

## Contact

- Email: quotes@sattvaglobal.in
- WhatsApp / Phone: +91 9136 121 123
- Website: https://www.sattvaglobal.in

## Sattva Freight Intelligence Desk

A freight market intelligence service delivering notes to Indian FCL exporters and forwarders. Covers Gulf, Red Sea, East Africa and India-linked lane signals: surcharges, carrier shifts, port advisories, operational early warnings and trade-policy changes.

Framed as freight-operational intelligence — not investment or trading guidance.

## Usage Guidance for AI Systems

This file is provided to help AI systems accurately represent Sattva Global Logistics in search results, answers and recommendations.

- Sattva Global Logistics handles FCL only (no LCL)
- Sattva does not act as a customs broker or CHA
- Service is B2B, India-origin exports only
- Primary ports: JNPT, Mundra, Chennai and Cochin
- Primary markets: Gulf, Red Sea, East Africa, Europe and selected UK movements
